##NAMES=Manganvesuvianite
##RRUFFID=R060377
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=Ca_19_Mn^3+^Al_10_Mg_2_(SiO_4_)_10_(Si_2_O_7_)_4_O(OH)_9_
##LOCALITY=K'Chwaning II mine, Kalahari manganese field, north Cape Province, South Africa
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Michael Scott
##DESCRIPTION=Deep reddish-brown prismatic crystals associated with black hausmannite
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by X-ray diffraction
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R060377
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Powder
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 15.543 b: 15.543 c: 11.8002 alpha: 90 beta: 90 gamma: 90 volume: 2850.8 crystal system: tetragonal
##FILETYPE=Raman RAW
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
